svg.title: ABB IRC140 robotic drawing workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the sequence of operations for an ABB IRC140 robot that draws letters LUIS and DUVAN on a conveyor belt cake

polygon.style: fill: var(--color-background-secondary); stroke: var(--color-border-secondary);;fill:rgb(38, 38, 36);stroke:rgba(222, 220, 209, 0.3);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:0.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
